critical_code_review_comments: ✅ ProductBoxConfig.js defines all 14 pillars with correct IDs: celebrate, dine, stay, travel, care, enjoy, fit, learn, paperwork, advisory, emergency, farewell, adopt, shop
✅ ServiceBox.jsx defines all 14 pillars with matching IDs

✅ POST /api/service-requests endpoint at line 6020 in server.py correctly creates unified flow: admin_notifications → service_desk_tickets → unified_inbox → service_requests → member_notifications → pillar_requests
✅ Response includes all required IDs: ticket_id, notification_id, inbox_id
✅ Desktop navbar shows all 14 pillar dropdowns
✅ Mobile view has hamburger menu, search, and bottom navigation (HOME, CARE, ORDERS, MY PET)
